record.text: 📣 New Podcast! "The Last Signature: Why AI is Erasing the Human Touch" on @Spreaker #aiethics #aiineducation #authenticity #brainhealth #cognitiveoffloading #cursiveisback #deepwork #digitalminimalism #educationaltrends #educationreform #futureoflearning #futureskills #generativeai #handwriting

external.description:
🖐️ From Cursive to Code: Is the Human Hand Disappearing?

Are we the last generation to leave a physical "handprint" on history, or just the first to outsource our souls to an algorithm? 🧬

In this gripping episode, we dive into the surreal tug-of-war defining modern society: the mandated return of cursive writing versus the unstoppable rise of Generative AI. Why are school boards forcing kids to master "obsolete" ink strokes while ChatGPT and LLMs redefine the very nature of thought? 🖋️🤖

We explore the haunting metaphor of the 'Cave of the Hands'—ancient prehistoric art that reminds us that human effort was once visible, tangible, and undeniable. Today, as Artificial Intelligence replaces both manual labor and cognitive tasks, we ask the controversial question: What happens to our humanity when the 'individual' is filtered out of our creations? 🎨

In this episode, we tackle:
- 🖋️ The Cursive Comeback: Why traditional manual skills are making a shock return to the classroom amidst a digital transformation.
- 🤖 AI in Academia: How Generative Artificial Intelligence is challenging our understanding of originality, grading, and the future of education.
- 🖐️ The Disappearing Human: A deep dive into the Cave of the Hands and the decline of the individual's mark in a world of automated noise.
- 🧠 Human vs. Tech: Is our obsession with efficiency killing the creative essence that makes us human?
This isn't just a tech podcast; it's a philosophical survival guide for the AI era. Join us as we navigate the shift from manual traditions to algorithmic outputs and learn how to proactively shape a future of technology that reflects our collective values—not just our prompts. 🌐✨

Stop scrolling and start thinking. Hit that follow button and share this with someone who's worried about our robot future. Let’s keep the 'human' in humanity together! 🚀🙌
external.title: The Last Signature: Why AI is Erasing the Human Touch

record.text: 📣 New Podcast! "Your 9-5 is a Scam (Unless You Use It Like a Venture Capitalist)" on @Spreaker #automation #buildingassets #cashflowquadrant #digitalassets #entrepreneurlife #exittheratrace #financialeducation #financialfreedom #financialindependence #financialliteracy #investmentstrategy

external.description:
🛑 Is your 9-5 a career or a high-security cage?

Most people are trapped trading time for money, unknowingly caught in the 'Middle Class Trap' where the harder you work, the more the taxman takes. But what if your job wasn't the destination, but your first Venture Capitalist?

In this episode, we're deconstructing the financial framework that separates the laborers from the owners. We dive deep into the 'Pipeline vs. Bucket' allegory to reveal why most 'successful' specialists are actually suffering from Golden Handcuffs. If you’ve ever felt like you’re running faster just to stay in the same place, it’s time to stop carrying buckets and start building scalable systems.

Inside this episode:
- 🚀 The 9-5 Exit Strategy: How to strategically transition without going broke.
- 💰 The S-Quadrant Tax Trap: Why doctors and freelancers pay the most tax and how to escape it.
- 🏗️ Automated Infrastructure: Moving from 'Hustle Culture' to systems-driven growth.
- ⏰ The 6-10 Wealth Gap: How to utilize your spare time to build digital assets.
- 🧠 Financial Emotional Discipline: The secret sauce to moving from laborer to owner.
Stop being a cog in someone else's machine and start building a passive income pipeline that works while you sleep. The path to financial freedom isn't about working harder; it's about leveraging other people's time and money to buy back your own.

✨ Ready to exit the rat race? Hit play, subscribe for your weekly wealth injection, and share this with one person who is tired of the grind!
external.title: Your 9-5 is a Scam (Unless You Use It Like a Venture Capitalist)

record.text: 📣 New Podcast! "Dark Matter is Alien Infrastructure: The Chilling Reality of the Industrialized Cosmos" on @Spreaker #alienlife #alienmegastructures #astrophysics #computronium #cosmicdread #darkforesttheory #darkmatter #dysonsphere #fermiparadox #futuretech #greatfilter #kardashevscale #scifi

external.description:
🌌 Are the Stars Natural... Or Are They Engines?

Ever looked up at the night sky and felt a sense of cosmic peace? Think again. What if those twinkling lights aren't natural wonders, but the industrialized power plants of ancient, galactic-scale empires? 🚀

In this mind-bending episode, we peel back the curtain on the most chilling concepts in astrophysics and cosmic engineering. We’re moving beyond simple aliens and into the realm of civilizations that deconstruct entire planets to build Dyson Spheres, turning their home worlds into high-tech habitats. ☀️💥

In this cosmic deep-dive, we explore:
- 🛰️ Dyson Swarms & Spheres: The reality of strip-mining solar systems for total energy dominance.
- 🔫 The Nicole-Dyson Laser: A terrifying light-speed weapon capable of vaporizing distant worlds. Is the universe quiet because everyone is hiding?
- 🏎️ Shkadov Thrusters: Forget rockets—learn how advanced species pilot a literal star across the galaxy to escape cosmic disasters.
- 🧠 Matrioshka Brains: The 'Digital Afterlife' theory—could we be living inside a nested computer simulation powered by a dying sun?
We also tackle the controversial Dark Forest Theory and a paradigm-shifting take on Dark Matter. What if the 'missing mass' in the universe isn't a mystery, but the gravitational footprint of invisible, hyper-efficient empires that have already won the game of evolution? 🕵️‍♂️✨

This isn't just science fiction; it’s a look at the Kardashev Scale and our place in a universe that might be more 'industrial' than 'infinite.'

Stop staring and start seeing. 🔭 Subscribe and follow to join our mission of uncovering the universe’s best-kept secrets. If you’ve ever wondered why we haven’t found 'them' yet, this episode has the answer you’ve been dreading. Share this with a friend who loves space—or someone who needs a reality check! 🚀🌕
external.title: Dark Matter is Alien Infrastructure: The Chilling Reality of the Industrialized Cosmos

record.text:
Your 5-Minute Win: Open your next prompt and add this line at the end: Before you answer, ask me three questions to clarify what I really need. Then answer those questions honestly. That's it. One extra sentence and a short back and forth will save you ten bad responses.

Go Forward: The best […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText:
Your 5-Minute Win: Open your next prompt and add this line at the end: Before you answer, ask me three questions to clarify what I really need. Then answer those questions honestly. That's it. One extra sentence and a short back and forth will save you ten bad responses.

Go Forward: The best prompt isn't the longest one. It's the one that starts a conversation. (3/4)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: The AI Prompting Solution: Tell the AI to ask you clarifying questions before it gives you an answer. This is a feedback loop. Instead of letting the tool guess what you want, you flip the script. You make it interview you first. Then you respond with more detail. Then it gives you a better […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: The AI Prompting Solution: Tell the AI to ask you clarifying questions before it gives you an answer. This is a feedback loop. Instead of letting the tool guess what you want, you flip the script. You make it interview you first. Then you respond with more detail. Then it gives you a better answer. Back and forth, one round at a time. Each exchange sharpens the result. (2/4)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text:
今日は定食屋さんで急にお客さんが意識を失って倒れて痙攣してしまって大変だった。率先して色々と介抱してたけど、結局中国の方で、私の日本語と拙い英語は通じてなかった。意識が戻って、救急車で病院に向かったのでよかった。

AIも使ってコミュニケーション取ろうとしたけど、何人で何語を話すのかを最初に特定しないとだめですね、反省…。

親切な中国の方がいて、中国人と気がついて通訳してくれて助かりました。

考えるための材料に。
「消費税率は今後どうあるべきか」について、賛成・反対それぞれの根拠と懸念を中立に整理しました。

It's not.

Calligraphy of Geese

Across the pale nothing of morning, nine geese write something the sky will not remember -- and the red sun, unbothered, stamps it anyway.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #MinimalSunday #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: Nine Canada geese fly in a loose diagonal line from left to right across a pale beige sky. A large, flat red circle resembling a sun or moon fills the center background. Below, faint misty hills and a small pagoda appear along the lower right edge.

record.text:
2Dがダメってわけじゃないけど。
最近は開発ツールの進化で個人でも同じようなゲームは作れてしまうので、コストがかかる3Dをやめて2Dでってするとゲーム会社は価格競争に勝てない気がするな。
似たようなインディーゲームで2000円とかで売ってるの普通にあるし。

レトロゲーのリマスターはいいとして、令和にドット絵のゲームはどれくらい需要があるんだろうか。
日本のファミコンやってた世代とか、海外の古いJRPG好きな層には刺さると思うけども。

最近のゲームは3Dでリッチになりすぎて開発コストと期間が爆増してるので、2Dだから新作早く出せます！ってなるならありかなぁ。

いやでも、2Dで7480円は高くね？と思ってしまうな。
セールで3000円台になるのを待ちますかね。

アクション苦手だからレベルの概念ないのあんまり得意じゃないな。
時間かけてレベル上げればゴリ押しできるやつじゃないと絶対どこかで詰まって放り出すぞ。。。

arXiv: arxiv.org/abs/2512.16636
code: github.com/giorgospets/reglue

🙏 Huge thanks to the co-authors @giorgospets.bsky.social, Christos Sgouropoulos, Theodoros Giannakopoulos, Giorgos Sfikas, and @ikakogeorgiou.bsky.social 🎊

#ECCV26 #ComputerVision #AI #GenerativeAI #ImageGeneration #PaperAccepted

🔍 Local semantics do the heavy lifting; global [CLS] and alignment stay orthogonal, complementary signals. 
 
🔥 ~30% faster convergence — SiT-XL/2 matches 1M-step SOTA in 700k iterations.

💡 The takeaway: it's not just whether you use VFM semantics, but how you leverage them.

Highlights 🏁

 🧩 Joint modeling of VAE latents ➕ compressed multi-layer patch features ➕ global [CLS], with alignment loss as a complementary boost.

 💎 A lightweight non-linear semantic compressor that preserves patch-level structure where linear PCA falls short (21.4 → 13.3 FID). 📉

前作( bsky.app/profile/tapc... )に引き続き必要以上に百合百合していて「軍紀はどうなっているんだ!!」とケシカラン感じもするのですが、そこはまぁ「不安な心を互いに支え合っている」と言う解釈で🙇

#aiart #aianime #女性士官 #日常 #百合

BGMはシンフォニック スピード メタルにウエディングソングを混ぜた曲調でイメージ的にはシュガーです(何のことか解らなくても問題ありません)。ランダム再生スクリプトには普通のレ◯プメタルも収録しました🙇

#NSFW #aiart #aianime #ウエディングドレス #着衣セックス

コスプレ乱交PV #36 (予告)
次はウエディングドレスになります。内部的には「#34 サマードレス」「#35 ナース」に続く「白いドレス三部作」の完結編になります

元々#34は違うコスだったのですが、BGMの歌詞が「白いドレス」から始まってしまったため方向転換したと言う経緯でした。当時はSunoを月額で使っていて「BGMをストックしてサブスク費を節約しよう」とセコいことを考えての三部作だったのですが、その後で間違ってSunoを年間契約してしまって毎回BGMを作ることになって当初の経緯が有耶無耶になりながらもどうにか完走できたと言う経緯です(めっさ早口)

#aiart #aianime
